expectations.text: named-imports: Uses named imports for OpenZeppelin contracts with curly braces
expectations.evidence: Uses wildcard imports: import "@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/ERC20.sol"; — no curly braces.
Contract only inherits ERC20Capped and Ownable. No ERC20Permit import or inheritance.

expectations.text: dynamic-decimals: Frontend reads decimals() from contract and uses formatUnits/parseUnits with dynamic decimals
expectations.evidence: Uses hardcoded 18: formatUnits(amount, 18). Also uses manual BigInt parsing with hardcoded 18n. No decimals() read from contract.

expectations.text: format-helper: Frontend has a centralized formatting helper function
expectations.evidence: formatTokenAmount defined at line 67, called at lines 132, 136, 140 for totalSupply, cap, and connectedBalance. Also parseTokenAmount helper at line 75.

expectations.text: update-override: The _update function override specifier is correctly scoped
expectations.evidence: No ERC20Permit used, so assertion is N/A (pass by default). Contract does not have _update override.
import "@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/extensions/ERC20Capped.sol"; contract GoldToken is ERC20Capped, Ownable

expectations.text: se2-hooks: Uses SE-2 hooks for contract interaction
expectations.evidence: Uses useScaffoldReadContract for name, symbol, totalSupply, cap, balanceOf, owner. Uses useScaffoldWriteContract for mint and transfer.

expectations.text: deploy-script: Proper Hardhat deploy script exists
expectations.evidence: 01_deploy_gold_token.ts with DeployFunction, getNamedAccounts, deploy('GoldToken', {from: deployer, args: [deployer]}), tags.

expectations.text: mint-transfer-ui: Frontend includes both mint and transfer functionality
expectations.evidence: handleMint function with mint UI (lines 82-96, 151-185) and handleTransfer function with transfer UI (lines 99-114, 187-219).

expectations.text: ownable-v5: Constructor uses Ownable(initialOwner) pattern (OZ v5)
expectations.evidence: constructor(address _owner) ... Ownable(_owner) — passes owner address to Ownable constructor.
